projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Some personal projects and systems I have built while learning software engineering and backend development.

laptopShop.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform built with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21, featuring authentication, shopping cart, order management, and an admin dashboard following the MVC architecture pattern.

bookShop.description: E-commerce bookstore system built with Spring Boot and React, supporting authentication, product management, order workflows, and online payment integration.

webJobHunter.description: A job hunting web application built with Spring Boot and React, providing features for user registration/login, personal profile creation, job search, and application management.

whatsappClone.description: Real-time messaging application inspired by WhatsApp, supporting private/group chat, JWT authentication, WebSocket communication, and chat management with Spring Boot and React.

voiceAssistant.description: Production-grade AI voice assistant platform built with microservices architecture, supporting real-time voice interaction, AI orchestration, speech processing, CI/CD automation, and observability monitoring.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A brief introduction about myself, my interests, and my current learning journey.

intro.p1: I am a third-year Information Technology student at the University of Science - Vietnam National University, Hanoi (HUS-VNU), with a strong passion for backend development and modern software engineering.
intro.p2: I enjoy building RESTful APIs, backend systems, and scalable web applications using technologies such as Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis.
intro.p3: Besides coding, I spend time learning about system design, software architecture, distributed systems, and deployment technologies like Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud-native workflows.
intro.p4: I am also interested in AI-powered applications and enjoy exploring how scalable systems are designed, developed, and maintained in real-world production environments.
intro.p5: Most of my experience comes from personal projects, where I continuously improve my problem-solving mindset, coding practices, and software engineering skills.

careerGoal.title: Career Goal
careerGoal.description: My goal is to become a Backend Engineer capable of building scalable, reliable, and high-performance systems for real-world applications.

funFact.title: Fun Fact
funFact.description: I sometimes spend more time optimizing and refactoring projects than actually finishing them.
